description: A three-pattern post-rock build in E minor. Inspired by Mogwai and Godspeed You! Black Emperor: bass-first grooves that swell into full-band climaxes. P1 lays the rhythmic foundation (bass + drums), P2 introduces a high-register Electric Bass Finger solo voice (same family, one octave up), P3 adds strings for the full post-rock swell. Tension arc 0.0→0.45→0.75 drives chromatic approach figures that create the characteristic Mogwai-style harmonic crunch before downbeats.

melody.role: electric bass finger (upper solo register, P2+P3)

patterns.label: Pattern 1 — foundation (bass + drums)
patterns.note: Pure rhythmic foundation. No melody. Sets the post-rock groove.

patterns.label: Pattern 2 — climb (bass + solo + drums)
patterns.note: High-register Electric Bass Finger solo joins. Approach notes beginning to appear.

patterns.label: Pattern 3 — climax (full build: bass + solo + strings + drums)
patterns.note: Strings pad layer completes the post-rock swell. Peak chromatic tension.
